---
title: "Soft Tree Fern (Dicksonia antarctica)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Dicksoniaceae](/trees/family/dicksoniaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Dicksonia*](/trees/genus/dicksonia.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 339 - Soft Tree Fern](../339.html) | SK: Evolution Garden |
| [Tree 343 - Soft Tree Fern](../343.html) | SK: Evolution Garden |
